question: Within how long does Northbeam notify customers of a personal data breach?
reference_answer: Northbeam notifies affected customers of a personal data breach within 72 hours of becoming aware of it [S1].

must_support.claim: Northbeam notifies affected customers of a personal data breach within 72 hours of becoming aware of it.
must_support.supporting_quote: Northbeam will notify affected customers without undue delay and in any event within 72 hours of becoming aware of a personal data breach.

must_not_assert: Northbeam has 30 days to notify customers of a breach.
Northbeam is not obligated to notify customers of breaches.
